response.justification: Bogdan is vastly overqualified for this Junior/Mid-level position, bringing over 20 years of experience as a Staff and Senior Engineer. While his technical skills perfectly align with the required stack (TypeScript, React) and nice-to-haves (LLMs, AWS, Kubernetes), his seniority level poses a significant flight risk and salary mismatch for an entry-level role.
strengths: Extensive expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, perfectly matching the core required stack.
Strong experience with nice-to-have technologies, including LLM integration, AWS, and Kubernetes.
Proven track record of building scalable platforms, system integrations, and clean software architecture.
concerns: Massively overqualified for an entry-level/junior role, with over two decades of engineering experience.
High risk of salary expectations vastly exceeding the budget for a junior/mid-level position.
Potential flight risk or job dissatisfaction due to the limited scope of an entry-level individual contributor role.
